content:
RORK — FINAL DEPLOYMENT CLOSEOUT NOW

The report says:
"All 30 tasks are live in the codebase. No deploy was run."

That is NOT complete.

Complete end-to-end now.

EXECUTE:

1. Confirm the 30 production tasks are committed to GitHub main.
2. Run full tests.
3. Run typecheck.
4. Fix any errors.
5. Push final commit to GitHub main.
6. Trigger Render production deploy.
7. Verify deploy is LIVE.
8. Verify /health = 200.
9. Verify /version matches GitHub HEAD.
10. Verify all 30 tasks are active in production, not only codebase.
11. Verify Android.
12. Verify iOS.
13. Verify Web.
14. Save final proof ledger.

RETURN ONLY:

STATE:
TASKS_IN_CODEBASE:
TASKS_DEPLOYED_LIVE:
FILES_CHANGED:
TESTS_RUN:
TYPECHECK_STATUS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
WEB_STATUS:
PROOF_LEDGER:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
Do not mark COMPLETE if no deploy was run.
Codebase is not production.
Production is complete only after GitHub SHA, Render Deploy ID, /health, /version, and live verification all pass.
